proven.claim: Claim: `projectRoot` is a directory that contains at least one of the marker
proven.smt2:
; LINE: 134
; PRINCIPLE: P5 – Project‑root discovery correctness
; Claim: `projectRoot` is a directory that contains at least one of the marker
;        files {".neurallog", "package.json", ".git"}.
;        We model the existence of a marker as a Boolean (1 = exists, 0 = absent).

(declare-const has_neurallog Int)
(declare-const has_package  Int)
(declare-const has_git      Int)

; Code: while climbing directories, return the first dir where any marker exists.
; Therefore at least one of the three flags must be 1.
(assert (or (= has_neurallog 1) (= has_package 1) (= has_git 1)))

; Negated claim: the logged projectRoot contains none of the markers
(assert (and (= has_neurallog 0) (= has_package 0) (= has_git 0)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat   → the log always prints a valid project root.
